title: asplenium marinum var. marinum
intro: Asplenium marinum var. marinum, also known as sea spleenwort, is a rare and endemic species of fern found primarily in coastal areas, particularly in the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with sea spleenwort include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory conditions, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, sea spleenwort is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety as a treatment for specific conditions have not been extensively scientifically studied.
